items.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
items.summary: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.

items.title: Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
items.summary: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
items.summary: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 德法歐洲新戰機計畫告吹  西班牙軍工巨頭組新聯盟接手
items.summary: 在法國與德國的意見分歧，導致歐洲一項指標性的國防合作計畫流產後，包括國家龍頭企業「英德拉」（Indra）在內的西班牙頂尖國防公司，11日紛紛表態願意加入開發新型聯合戰鬥機的行...…

items.title: 南韓首爾松坡區竟「選票足夠」 選管會曝「這環節」嚴重失誤
items.summary: 韓國各單位持續調查地方選舉選票不足事件，中央選舉管理委員會代理委員長魏哲煥今天表示，其實當時首爾松坡區整體仍有剩約4萬2000張選票，但未能妥善分配是痛心的失誤。  韓國3日進行的地方選...…

items.title: 修正日本教科書台灣不當標示 「日台友好議聯」列重點事項
items.summary: 對於日本部分的學校教科書，將台灣與中國置於同一框架下處理，可能讓日本學生誤以為台灣是「中國領土」的表述，日本國會跨黨派友台議員團體「日本台灣友好議員聯盟」在11日召...…
